ddls:
CREATE TABLE "angels" (
  "angel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each angel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the angel */,
  "choir" TEXT /* Choir of the angel */,
  "archangel" TEXT /* Archangel of the angel */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality associated with the angel */,
  "power" TEXT /* Power or area of influence of the angel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the angel */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the angel */,
  "symbolism" TEXT /* Symbolic meanings associated with the angel */,
  "associated_elements" TEXT /* Elements associated with the angel */,
  "historical_context" TEXT /* Historical context or background of the angel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("angel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the user */,
  "angel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's associated angel */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography or introduction of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user's account is active */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* JSON object storing user's notification preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_angel_id FOREIGN KEY ("angel_id") REFERENCES angels ("angel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prayers" (
  "prayer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prayer or meditation */,
  "angel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the angel associated with the prayer or meditation */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the prayer or meditation */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the prayer or meditation */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the prayer or meditation */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the prayer or meditation */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the prayer or meditation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who created the prayer or meditation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prayer or meditation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prayer or meditation was last updated */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the prayer or meditation is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prayer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prayers_angel_id FOREIGN KEY ("angel_id") REFERENCES angels ("angel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prayers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES administrators ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_prayers" (
  "user_prayer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user's saved prayer or meditation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who saved the prayer or meditation */,
  "prayer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prayer or meditation */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prayer or meditation was saved by the user */,
  "is_favorite" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the prayer or meditation is marked as a favorite by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_prayer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_prayers_prayer_id FOREIGN KEY ("prayer_id") REFERENCES prayers ("prayer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_prayers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the post */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the post is pinned to the top of the community board */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the post has been deleted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the comment has been deleted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES community_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for the administrator */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the administrator's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the administrator logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the administrator's account is active */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "angel_birthdays" (
  "angel_birthday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each angel's birthday range */,
  "angel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the angel */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the birthday range */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the birthday range */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the significance of the birthday range */,
  "associated_events" TEXT /* Events or activities associated with the birthday range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("angel_birthday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_angel_birthdays_angel_id FOREIGN KEY ("angel_id") REFERENCES angels ("angel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "user_progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user's progress */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "prayer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prayer or meditation */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress of the user (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user started the prayer or meditation */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user completed the prayer or meditation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or reflections the user has added about the prayer or meditation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_prayer_id FOREIGN KEY ("prayer_id") REFERENCES prayers ("prayer_id")
)
